TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Bidhya Devi Bhandari == ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 6, Bidhya Devi Bhandari, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Nepal ta' misuw hya' ga Bidhya Devi Bhandari, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Bhandari htgan na ryax maki Bhojpur na Mane Bhanjyang qalang. mintzyuwaw nya 1988 kawas Bhandari sakang' pzi'an unro. 1993 kawas 5 byacing 16 ryax beh nya msqun mtzyaw mnos basu wal huqil la. Bhandari ru Madan Bhandari kekong.maki sazing kneril laqi Usha Kiran Bhandari ru Nisha Kusum Bhandari. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == βi*ħja *e*i βħan*ari == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βi*ħja *e*i βħan*ari, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw nepal taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa βi*ħja *e*i βħan*ari, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. βħan*ari ħtɣan na rjax maki βħojpur na mane βħanjjaŋ qalaŋ. mintzjuwaw nja **** kawas~ɕ βħan*ari s~ɕakaŋʔ pziʔan unro. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax βeħ nja ms~ɕqun mtzjaw mnos~ɕ βas~ɕu wal ħuqil la. βħan*ari ru ma*an βħan*ari kekoŋ.maki s~ɕaziŋ kneril laqi us~ɕħa kiran βħan*ari ru nis~ɕħa kus~ɕum βħan*ari. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: == Bidhya Devi Bhandari == ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 6, Bidhya Devi Bhandari, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Nepal ta' misuw hya' ga Bidhya Devi Bhandari, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Bhandari htgan na ryax maki Bhojpur na Mane Bhanjyang qalang. mintzyuwaw nya 1988 kawas Bhandari sakang' pzi'an unro. 1993 kawas 5 byacing 16 ryax beh nya msqun mtzyaw mnos basu wal huqil la. Bhandari ru Madan Bhandari kekong.maki sazing kneril laqi Usha Kiran Bhandari ru Nisha Kusum Bhandari. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == βi*ħja *e*i βħan*ari == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βi*ħja *e*i βħan*ari, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw nepal taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa βi*ħja *e*i βħan*ari, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. βħan*ari ħtɣan na rjax maki βħojpur na mane βħanjjaŋ qalaŋ. mintzjuwaw nja **** kawas~ɕ βħan*ari s~ɕakaŋʔ pziʔan unro. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax βeħ nja ms~ɕqun mtzjaw mnos~ɕ βas~ɕu wal ħuqil la. βħan*ari ru ma*an βħan*ari kekoŋ.maki s~ɕaziŋ kneril laqi us~ɕħa kiran βħan*ari ru nis~ɕħa kus~ɕum βħan*ari. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
